summary: COMPREHENSIVE DEEP TEST - All 54 backend tests passed. Full frontend E2E testing completed across all roles (player, venue_owner, super_admin, coach). All major features verified: Auth, Player Dashboard, Venue Discovery, Booking Flow with Split Payment, Matchmaking with Compatibility Scores, Leaderboard with Rankings, Rating Profile with Chain Verification, Dynamic Pricing Rules, Subscription Plans, Super Admin Console, Video Highlights Upload, IoT Smart Lighting with MQTT Connected (broker.emqx.io), Notifications, Mobile Responsiveness.

venue_discovery_tests: Venue cards display correctly with images, ratings, prices, amenities
venue_detail_tests: GET /api/venues/{id}/slots?date=YYYY-MM-DD - slot grid with prices per turf
Dynamic pricing applied to slots (morning ₹1700, afternoon ₹2000, evening ₹2200)
booking_flow_tests: POST /api/bookings - create booking (graceful degradation with Redis down)
Booking dialog opens with Full Payment and Split Payment options
Split payment with 4 shares created successfully
matchmaking_tests: GET /api/matchmaking/recommended - For You with compatibility scores (100% match)
leaderboard_tests: Rankings show rating, games, wins, tier badges (Gold/Silver)
rating_profile_tests: GET /api/rating/history/{userId} - rating history with chain-hashed records
venue_owner_dashboard_tests: GET /api/analytics/venue/{id} - venue analytics with revenue chart
super_admin_tests: GET /api/admin/users - users list with role badges
video_highlights_tests: Upload page with drag & drop (MP4, MOV, AVI, WebM - Max 100MB)
shared_highlight_tests: GET /api/highlights/shared/{shareId} - public page works without auth
iot_tests: POST /api/iot/devices/{id}/control - device toggle on/off via MQTT
mobile_tests: Bottom nav visible on mobile viewport (390px)
Dashboard stats in 2x2 grid on mobile

frontend_verification.landing_page: Beautiful hero with stats (500+ Active Venues, 50K+ Players, 99.9% IoT Uptime, 4.8 Avg Rating)
frontend_verification.auth_page: Login/SignUp tabs with demo credentials shown
frontend_verification.player_dashboard: Stats cards (Skill Rating: 1650, Games: 49, Win Rate: 45%, Upcoming: 3), Upcoming Bookings list
frontend_verification.venue_discovery: 4 venue cards with images, sport tags, ratings, prices, amenities, search and filter
frontend_verification.venue_detail: Hero image, calendar picker, slot grid with 2 turfs, dynamic pricing, booking dialog with split payment
frontend_verification.matchmaking: For You/All Games/My Games/Mercenary tabs, Auto-Match feature, compatibility scores
frontend_verification.leaderboard: Your Ranking card, player rankings with tier badges (Gold/Silver)
frontend_verification.rating_profile: Rating Certificate with Verified badge, Chain Integrity section (Intact/Consistent), Match History
frontend_verification.owner_dashboard: Stats (4 Venues, 3 Bookings, ₹4.1K Revenue), venue selector, Bookings/Pricing/Analytics/Plan tabs
frontend_verification.pricing_rules: 3 rules (Weekend Surge 1.2x, Peak Hours 1.1x, Early Bird Discount 0.85x) with toggles and edit/delete
frontend_verification.subscription_plans: Current Plan: Pro, Available Plans: Free/Basic/Pro with features
frontend_verification.admin_dashboard: Overview/Users/Venues/Settings tabs, platform stats and recent registrations
frontend_verification.highlights_page: AI Analysis header, drag & drop upload area, Your Highlights list
frontend_verification.iot_dashboard: MQTT Connected status, 6/7 Online, 5 Active devices, Devices/Zones/Energy/Schedule tabs

seed_data_creation: 4 venues, 3 bookings, 7 IoT devices, 3 zones, pricing rules - all seeded from demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: COMPREHENSIVE DEEP TEST COMPLETE. All features working end-to-end. MQTT is LIVE (broker.emqx.io:1883). Redis is DOWN but booking flow gracefully degrades. Razorpay is MOCKED. AI analysis uses live Gemini 2.5 Flash via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. All 4 roles tested (player, venue_owner, super_admin, coach).

mocked_apis.Razorpay payments: MOCKED - Payment dialog shows 'Payment is MOCKED for demo purposes'
mocked_apis.Gemini AI: LIVE - via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for video analysis

feature_summary.auth: Multi-role authentication working (player, venue_owner, super_admin, coach)
feature_summary.booking: Full booking flow with split payment, dynamic pricing applied correctly
feature_summary.matchmaking: Match creation, recommendations with compatibility scores, auto-match
feature_summary.rating: Glicko-2 rating system with tamper-proof chain verification
feature_summary.iot: Real MQTT connection to broker.emqx.io, device/zone control, energy analytics
feature_summary.highlights: Video upload and AI analysis (Gemini 2.5 Flash)
feature_summary.admin: Full platform management with users, venues, settings
